# makeTextSmaller(_:)

**Instance Method**

Action method that reduces the text size by one unit.

## Declaration

```swift
@IBAction @MainActor func makeTextSmaller(_ sender: Any?)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object that sent this message.

## Changing the Text Size

- **canMakeTextLarger**: A Boolean that indicates whether the text can be made larger.
- **makeTextLarger(_:)**: Action method that increases the text size by one unit.
- **canMakeTextSmaller**: A Boolean that indicates whether the text can be made smaller.
